title: PhD in Political Economy of Climate Change Adaptation Policies
description: PhD position within the NCCR CLIM+ initiative, investigating the political economy of climate change adaptation policies. Research focuses on how political processes, institutional structures, and extreme events shape adaptation policy design. Mixed-method approach combining qualitative policy analysis with quantitative causal inference.

title: PhD in Environmental Science & Policy
stipend: Full tuition + living allowance + health insurance
description: Fully funded 4-year PhD programme at CEU Vienna covering Climate, Energy & Resource Management (CERM) and Advanced Methods & Skills (AMS). Strong quantitative/GIS methods track. English-only, international students welcome. Next cycle applications open ~September 2026.

title: MRes + PhD in Economics / Business Data Science
description: Elite 2-year MRes followed by PhD at Tinbergen Institute, a collaboration between Erasmus University Rotterdam, University of Amsterdam, and VU Amsterdam. Tracks in Economics and Business Data Science. One of Europe's top economics graduate schools.

title: PhD in Computer Science / Regional Science & Economic Geography
description: 38 fully funded PhD scholarships across 4 tracks including Computer Science (AI/ML focus) and Regional Science & Economic Geography. Small elite research institute in L'Aquila, Italy. 100% fully funded, interdisciplinary environment. Watch for 2026/2027 cycle.

title: PhD in Economics, Applied Data Science & Decision Sciences (EADS)
university: IMT School for Advanced Studies Lucca
description: Fully funded PhD in Economics, Applied Data Science and Decision Sciences at IMT Lucca. Covers network analysis, behavioral economics, quantitative methods. 6 fully funded places, 3-4 year program. English only, international students welcome. Next cycle ~2027.

title: PhD in NLP & LLM Safety
description: Fully funded PhD positions at CopeNLU Lab under Prof. Isabelle Augenstein (top NLP researcher). Focus on large language model safety, explainable AI, and NLP. Funded by Danish Independent Research Fund. Positions open periodically — watch the lab website.

title: PhD Fellowships in Data Science
description: Annual PhD fellowship program from the Danish Data Science Academy covering data science applications across multiple disciplines. Multiple universities. Strong interdisciplinary focus. Excellent stipend by European standards.

title: PhD in Environmental Science (Australian RTP Scholarship)
description: Fully funded PhD under the Australian Government Research Training Program (RTP) scholarship. Covers tuition fees + living stipend. Environmental science focus with dual-degree options. Open to international students.

title: PhD in Agricultural Economics and Climate Policy (ACHIEVE Project)
stipend: Competitive ETH Zürich salary (4-year full funding)
description: Fully funded 4-year PhD in the Agricultural Economics and Policy Group at ETH Zürich, part of the national ACHIEVE Project on net-zero emissions in Swiss agri-food systems. Research on reducing GHG emissions and developing evidence-based climate policy solutions.

title: PhD in Innovation Economics and Policy for Climate Resilience
supervisor: Prof. Tobias Schmidt / Prof. Bjarne Steffen
description: Full PhD position in the Energy and Technology Policy Group at ETH Zürich, part of NCCR CLIM+. Research on how knowledge localization and innovation can address supply chain disruptions from climate extremes. Empirical studies with patents and innovation data.

title: Fully Funded PhD in Ethical AI for Fair University Admissions
university: City St George's, University of London
description: Fully funded PhD backed by UK Innovation and BHE Uni. Research on building unbiased AI systems for fair university admissions, with focus on ethical AI and bias mitigation. Real-world testing on actual admissions systems. Open to international students.

title: SPRING Doctoral Network — 15 PhD Positions in CS, AI & Control Systems
stipend: MSCA doctoral salary (varies by host country)
description: 15 fully funded PhD positions across Europe under Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions (Horizon Europe). Focus on resilient cyber-physical infrastructures — energy systems, water networks, transportation. Topics include AI, control systems, cybersecurity, and human-centered design. International secondments included.

title: International PhD in Economics — Université Côte d'Azur
description: Fully funded 4-year International PhD in Economics combining micro/macro, econometrics, and computational/complexity economics. Year 1 at Scuola Superiore Sant'Anna (Pisa, Italy), semester at Côte d'Azur, research at GREDEG. Co-tutelle opportunities. Next cycle expected 2027.

title: PhD in Climate Change, Human Migration and Relocation
description: Fully funded PhD in an ARC Discovery Project on climate-related community relocation. Research on social, political, and ethical dimensions of climate displacement, comparative case studies, policy frameworks, and Indigenous perspectives. Flexible research design within the project scope.

title: PhD in Science and Management of Climate Change
description: 4-year fully funded PhD programme on Science and Management of Climate Change, jointly offered by University of Venice and CMCC. Includes one year of full-time coursework with worldwide research opportunities and connections to 50+ global partner universities.

title: PhD in Renewable Energy, Sustainability, and Smart Systems
stipend: Fully funded (CSC + Exeter): tuition fees + living costs
other_language_note: Must be Chinese national eligible for CSC support
description: Fully funded PhD jointly supported by CSC and University of Exeter for 2026/27 entry. Research areas include floating solar, green hydrogen, building energy efficiency, hybrid systems, and ecological modeling. Deadline August 1, 2026.

title: PhD in Modeling and Data Science (3 Fully Funded Positions)
description: 3 fully funded PhD positions in the interdisciplinary Modeling and Data Science program at University of Turin. Covers mathematics, computer science, economics, statistics, and physics. Program starts November 1, 2026. Additional company-funded positions may be added.

title: PhD in Electrical Engineering & Computer Science (EECS)
description: Fully funded PhD in EECS at MIT. All admitted PhD students receive full financial support including tuition, stipend (~$43k/year), and health insurance for 5 years. Research areas include AI, machine learning, data science, NLP, systems, and theory. International students welcome.

title: PhD in Computer Science
description: Fully funded PhD in Computer Science at Stanford. All admitted PhD students receive full financial support for 5 years: tuition, stipend (~$46k/year), and health benefits. Strengths in AI, ML, NLP, human-computer interaction, systems, and theoretical CS. International students welcome.

title: PhD in Information Science (Data Science & AI)
description: Fully funded PhD at UC Berkeley School of Information. Research in data science, AI ethics, human-data interaction, NLP, and social computing. Students receive multi-year fellowship packages covering tuition and stipend. International students welcome.

title: PhD in Sustainable Development
description: Fully funded PhD in Sustainable Development at Columbia University. Run jointly by Columbia Earth Institute and SIPA. Research focuses on climate economics, environmental policy, energy transitions, and sustainable development. All admitted students receive full funding for 5 years. International students welcome.

title: PhD in Machine Learning
description: Fully funded PhD in Machine Learning at CMU Machine Learning Department — the world's first ML department. All PhD students receive full funding: tuition waiver, stipend (~$42k/year), and health coverage. Research areas: deep learning, probabilistic methods, NLP, reinforcement learning, AI for science. International students welcome.

title: PhD in Economics
description: Fully funded PhD in Economics at Yale. Strong in environmental economics, development economics, econometrics, and political economy. All admitted students receive 5-year full funding package: tuition, stipend, and health insurance. International students welcome.

title: PhD in Environmental Studies / High Meadows Environmental Institute
description: Fully funded PhD through Princeton's High Meadows Environmental Institute (HMEI). Interdisciplinary research spanning climate science, environmental policy, sustainability, and environmental economics. All PhD students receive full financial support for 5 years. International students welcome.

title: PhD in Economics
description: Fully funded PhD in Economics at the University of Chicago — one of the most prestigious economics programs in the world. All admitted students receive 5-year full funding. Strengths in price theory, econometrics, empirical economics, finance, and political economy. International students welcome.
